briefdescription.para: This function computes the hash of the message as required by the SLH_DSA algorithm.

para.verbatim: Gets signature and public key addresses from the instance structure for IPC compatibility.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if the operation was successful.
For R <- SIG.getR(), R = SIG[0 : n] - access from instance address
For PK.seed [0:n] and PK.root [n:2n] - access from instance address
[in] Length of public key in bytes
M' <- toByte(0,1) || toByte(|ctx|, 1) || ctx || M, here we send all prefix data before M
M, actual data - access from instance address

memberdef.argsstring: (const u64 PublicKeyAddr, const u64 InputAddr, u8 *const Output)
memberdef.name: XSecure_SlhdsaShake256sHashF

briefdescription.para: This function generates a hash value based on the provided public key and input data, and stores the result in the output buffer.

detaileddescription.para: It takes an n-byte message as input and produces an n-byte output.

parameterdescription.para: 64-bit address of the public key buffer.
64-bit address of the input data buffer to be hashed.
Pointer to the buffer where the computed hash will be stored.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if the operation was successful.

memberdef.argsstring: (const u64 InputAddr, const XSecure_SlhdsaChainConfig *const ChainConfig, const u64 PublicKeyAddr, u8 *const Output)
memberdef.name: XSecure_SlhdsaShake256sChain

briefdescription.para: This function performs chained SLH_DSA hash operations on the input data, starting from the specified index and performing the given number of steps.

parameterdescription.para: 64-bit address of the input data buffer.

Pointer to structure containing chain configuration:
StartIdx: Index in the input buffer from where the chain operation should start
Steps: Number of hash chain steps to perform
64-bit address of the public key used for verification.
Pointer to the buffer where the resulting hash will be stored.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if the operation was successful.

memberdef.argsstring: (const u64 PublicKeyAddr, const u8 *const Input, u32 InputLen, u8 *const Output)
memberdef.name: XSecure_SlhdsaShake256sHashTl

briefdescription.para: This function generates a hash value for the provided input data.

detaileddescription.para: The hash is computed with respect to the given public key and the result is stored in the output buffer.

parameterdescription.para: 64-bit address of the public key used for hashing.
Pointer to the input data to be hashed.
Length of the input data in bytes.
Pointer to the buffer where the computed hash will be stored.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if the hash was computed successfully.

memberdef.argsstring: (const u64 PublicKeyAddr, const u64 Data1Addr, const u64 Data2Addr, u8 *const Output)
memberdef.name: XSecure_SlhdsaShake256sHashH

briefdescription.para: This function generates a hash value for the provided input data.

detaileddescription.para: The hash is computed with respect to the given public key and the result is stored in the output buffer.

parameterdescription.para: 64-bit address of the public key used for hashing.
64-bit address of the first input data to be hashed.
64-bit address of the second input data to be hashed.
Pointer to the buffer where the hash output will be stored.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if the hash was computed successfully.

briefdescription.para: This file consists definitions for SLH-DSA hash operations.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
5.7 tvp 02/19/26 Initial release
